text:
O0100M2 Special Treatments/Programs: Isolation Post-admit Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident was in isolation or quarantined for active infectious disease (does not include standard body/fluid precautions) within the last 14 days while a resident of this facility. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern) discontinued 09/30/2023
502 O0100Z1_NO_TRTMT_PRIOR_CD O0100Z1_NO_TRTMT_PRIOR_CD O0100Z1 Special
